ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director of the movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "genres" TEXT /* Genres of the movie (e.g., Crime, Drama) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget of the movie */,
  "budget_unit" TEXT /* Currency unit of the budget */,
  "title_year" INTEGER /* Year the movie was released */,
  "imdb_score" REAL /* IMDB score of the movie */,
  "aspect_ratio" REAL /* Aspect ratio of the movie */,
  "movie_facebook_likes" INTEGER /* Number of Facebook likes for the movie */,
  "production_company" TEXT /* Production company of the movie */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the movie was produced */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the movie */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "certificate" TEXT /* Age rating (e.g., PG-13, R) */,
  "box_office_collection" REAL /* Total box office collection */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie trailer */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie poster */,
  "tagline" TEXT /* Tagline or catchphrase of the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the director */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Death date of the director (if applicable) */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the director */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the director */,
  "notable_works" TEXT /* List of notable works by the director */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the director's photo */,
  "awards" TEXT /* List of awards won by the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Name of the actor */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the actor */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Death date of the actor (if applicable) */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the actor */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the actor */,
  "notable_works" TEXT /* List of notable works by the actor */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the actor's photo */,
  "awards" TEXT /* List of awards won by the actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_cast" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the actor in the movie */,
  "character_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the character played by the actor */,
  "character_age" INTEGER /* Age of the character in the movie */,
  "character_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the character */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user posting the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (out of 5) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was posted */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes the review has received */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is featured */,
  "spoilers" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review contains spoilers */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user posting the review */,
  "user_photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., regular user, critic, admin) */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile photo */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the user */,
  "favorites" TEXT /* List of favorite movies */,
  "following" TEXT /* List of users the user follows */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user posting the rating */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (out of 5) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was posted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user posting the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (out of 5) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was posted */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes the review has received */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is featured */,
  "spoilers" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review contains spoilers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
